---
title: "About Me"
sidebar: false 
---

# Education

-   Hacettepe University — B.Sc. in Industrial Engineering (English)
2023 – Present

Hacettepe University — English Preparatory Program
2022 – 2023

Trabzon Yomra Science High School
2018 – 2022

# Work Experience


## Employements

Private Tutor (Freelance)
June 2022 – June 2025 (3 years)
	•	Provided one-on-one tutoring in mathematics, geometry, physics and Turkish.
	•	Helped students improve academic performance through personalized learning strategies.
	•	Developed structured study plans and tracked student progress.

## Internships

AKDAŞ Döküm Sanayi ve Tic. A.Ş. — Production Intern
August 2025 – September 2025 (1 month)
	•	Observed casting production processes and quality control stages.
	•	Collected and organized operational production data for reporting.
	•	Analyzed workflow steps and supported documentation of production processes.

Yılmazlar Lastik & İnşaat — Operations Intern
June 2024 – August 2024 (3 months)
	•	Assisted daily operational processes and coordinated communication between suppliers, customers and field teams.
	•	Organized operational data and supported workflow tracking in the office.

# Projects
Teknofest Air Defense Systems Competition — Sponsorship Team Captain
June 2024 – February 2025 (8 months)
	•	Managed sponsorship processes for the project team.
	•	Established communication with potential sponsors and developed partnerships.
	•	Coordinated sponsorship meetings, negotiations and financial contributions.

Unifestal — Corporate Coordinator & Social Media Specialist
October 2024 – July 2025 (9 months)

Corporate Coordinator (Jan 2025 – Jul 2025)
	•	Coordinated partnerships, sponsorship negotiations and event operations.

Social Media Specialist (Oct 2024 – Jan 2025)
	•	Planned social media strategies and created digital marketing content.

Hacettepe Economics Community — Promotion & Media Director
2024 – Present
	•	Led promotional campaigns and content production.
	•	Coordinated communication with stakeholders and managed team workflow.


# Competencies

Data & Analytical Skills
	•	Excel (Intermediate)
	•	Data Analysis
	•	Dashboard Creation
	•	Basic Statistical Analysis
	•	Data Reporting

Operations & Process Management
	•	Workflow Analysis
	•	Process Monitoring
	•	Basic Kaizen Approach
	•	Operational Coordination

Project & Organizational Skills
	•	Project Management
	•	Team Coordination
	•	Time Management
	•	Event Organization

Design & Digital Skills
	•	Adobe Photoshop (Advanced)
	•	Adobe After Effects (Advanced)
	•	Canva (Advanced)
	•	Visual Content Production

Languages
	•	English (C1 – Advanced)
	•	Italian (A2 – Basic)

# Hobbies
	•	Graphic Design
	•	Video Editing
	•	Technology & Data Analysis
	•	Event Organization
	•	Learning New Languages


## My CV

You can download my CV below:

[Download my CV](Deniz asmaz cv.pdf)

### Preview

```{=html}
<iframe src="cv.pdf" width="100%" height="600px"></iframe>
```
